context.audience: Web platform engineers shipping APIs on the edge, startup developers building globally distributed SaaS backends, and AI developers running inference and orchestration in Cloudflare's runtime
pain_points: Adapting Node.js-centric codebases to Workers runtime constraints
Choosing between Workers, Pages Functions, and Durable Objects for stateful logic
Managing cold path latency when combining Workers with external APIs and databases
Securing and rotating secrets across environments without leaking credentials
Designing reliable AI inference flows with Workers AI, queues, and retries
content_that_works: Workers AI model and routing comparisons
Durable Objects and queues implementation tutorials
subtopics: Workers API and route design patterns
Durable Objects for coordination and rate limiting
Observability and incident response on Cloudflare
